mapper.select:
SELECT e.event_seq ,e.slug ,e.title ,e.description AS summary ,e.start_at AS event_start_dt ,e.end_at AS event_end_dt ,e.venue_name AS location ,e.status ,CASE WHEN e.deleted_at IS NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS use_yn ,e.created_at AS rgst_date_time ,e.event_type ,o.name AS organization_name ,e.max_participants ,COALESCE(rc.registration_count, 0) AS registration_count FROM event.events e LEFT JOIN event.organizations o ON o.organization_seq = e.organization_seq LEFT JOIN ( SELECT event_seq, COUNT(*) AS registration_count FROM event.event_participants WHERE status = 'registered' GROUP BY event_seq ) rc ON rc.event_seq = e.event_seq
e.deleted_at IS NULL
AND e.status = ANY(string_to_array(#{status}, ','))
AND e.event_type = #{eventType}
AND e.organization_seq = #{organizationSeq}
AND ( e.title ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR o.name ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
ORDER BY e.start_at DESC, e.event_seq DESC

SELECT e.event_seq ,e.slug ,e.title ,e.description ,e.description AS content ,e.description AS summary ,e.start_at AS event_start_dt ,e.end_at AS event_end_dt ,e.registration_start_at AS registration_start_dt ,e.registration_end_at AS registration_end_dt ,e.venue_name AS location ,e.registration_type ,e.registration_url ,e.status ,e.rejection_reason ,CASE WHEN e.deleted_at IS NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS use_yn ,e.file_seq ,e.attachment_file_seq ,e.event_type ,e.organization_seq ,o.name AS organization_name ,e.max_participants ,e.is_paid ,e.created_by AS rgst_user_seq ,e.created_at AS rgst_date_time ,e.updated_by AS upt_user_seq ,e.updated_at AS upt_date_time FROM event.events e LEFT JOIN event.organizations o ON o.organization_seq = e.organization_seq WHERE e.event_seq = #{eventSeq} AND e.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT ep.event_page_seq ,ep.event_seq ,ep.language_code ,e.slug AS url_slug ,ep.page_status ,ep.page_title ,ep.page_subtitle ,ep.hero_title ,ep.hero_subtitle ,ep.hero_file_seq ,ep.theme_code ,ep.theme_json::text AS theme_json ,ep.settings_json::text AS settings_json ,ep.published_at ,e.title AS event_title ,e.description AS event_summary ,e.start_at AS event_start_dt ,e.end_at AS event_end_dt ,e.venue_name AS location ,e.registration_type ,e.registration_url ,e.status AS event_status ,e.event_type FROM event.event_pages ep INNER JOIN event.events e ON e.event_seq = ep.event_seq AND e.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE ep.deleted_at IS NULL AND ep.use_yn = 'Y' AND ep.page_status = 'published' AND LOWER(e.slug) = LOWER(#{urlSlug}) LIMIT 1

SELECT ep.event_page_seq ,ep.event_seq ,ep.language_code ,e.slug AS url_slug ,ep.page_status ,ep.page_title ,ep.page_subtitle ,ep.hero_title ,ep.hero_subtitle ,ep.hero_file_seq ,ep.theme_code ,ep.theme_json::text AS theme_json ,ep.settings_json::text AS settings_json ,ep.published_at ,e.title AS event_title ,e.description AS event_summary ,e.start_at AS event_start_dt ,e.end_at AS event_end_dt ,e.venue_name AS location ,e.registration_type ,e.registration_url ,e.status AS event_status ,e.event_type FROM event.event_pages ep INNER JOIN event.events e ON e.event_seq = ep.event_seq AND e.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE ep.deleted_at IS NULL AND ep.event_seq = #{eventSeq} AND ep.language_code = COALESCE(NULLIF(#{languageCode}, ''), 'en') LIMIT 1

SELECT section_seq ,event_page_seq ,component_template_seq ,section_key ,section_type ,title ,eyebrow ,subtitle ,body ,anchor_id ,nav_label ,show_in_nav_yn ,layout_type ,column_count ,sort_seq ,use_yn ,settings_json::text AS settings_json FROM event.event_page_sections WHERE event_page_seq = #{eventPageSeq} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY sort_seq ASC, section_seq ASC

SELECT b.block_seq ,b.section_seq ,b.parent_block_seq ,b.block_key ,b.block_type ,b.title ,b.subtitle ,b.summary ,b.body ,b.badge_text ,b.start_at ,b.end_at ,b.venue_name ,b.speaker_names ,b.organization_name ,b.button_label ,b.link_url ,b.link_target ,b.image_file_seq ,b.attachment_file_seq ,b.featured_yn ,b.sort_seq ,b.use_yn ,b.style_json::text AS style_json ,b.content_json::text AS content_json FROM event.event_page_blocks b INNER JOIN event.event_page_sections s ON s.section_seq = b.section_seq AND s.deleted_at IS NULL AND s.use_yn = 'Y' WHERE s.event_page_seq = #{eventPageSeq} AND b.deleted_at IS NULL AND b.use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY s.sort_seq ASC, b.parent_block_seq NULLS FIRST, b.sort_seq ASC, b.block_seq ASC

SELECT section_seq ,event_page_seq ,component_template_seq ,section_key ,section_type ,title ,eyebrow ,subtitle ,body ,anchor_id ,nav_label ,show_in_nav_yn ,layout_type ,column_count ,sort_seq ,use_yn ,settings_json::text AS settings_json FROM event.event_page_sections WHERE event_page_seq = #{eventPageSeq} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY sort_seq ASC, section_seq ASC

SELECT b.block_seq ,b.section_seq ,b.parent_block_seq ,b.block_key ,b.block_type ,b.title ,b.subtitle ,b.summary ,b.body ,b.badge_text ,b.start_at ,b.end_at ,b.venue_name ,b.speaker_names ,b.organization_name ,b.button_label ,b.link_url ,b.link_target ,b.image_file_seq ,b.attachment_file_seq ,b.featured_yn ,b.sort_seq ,b.use_yn ,b.style_json::text AS style_json ,b.content_json::text AS content_json FROM event.event_page_blocks b INNER JOIN event.event_page_sections s ON s.section_seq = b.section_seq AND s.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE s.event_page_seq = #{eventPageSeq} AND b.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY s.sort_seq ASC, b.parent_block_seq NULLS FIRST, b.sort_seq ASC, b.block_seq ASC

SELECT component_category_seq ,category_code ,category_name ,description ,sort_seq FROM event.event_page_component_categories WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY sort_seq ASC, component_category_seq ASC

SELECT component_template_seq ,component_category_seq ,component_scope ,template_code ,component_type ,template_name ,description ,icon_name ,preview_file_seq ,default_title ,default_subtitle ,form_schema_json::text AS form_schema_json ,default_settings_json::text AS default_settings_json ,default_content_json::text AS default_content_json ,allowed_child_types::text AS allowed_child_types ,sort_seq FROM event.event_page_component_templates WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY component_scope DESC, component_category_seq ASC, sort_seq ASC, component_template_seq ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO event.event_pages ( event_seq ,language_code ,page_status ,page_title ,page_subtitle ,hero_title ,hero_subtitle ,hero_file_seq ,theme_code ,theme_json ,settings_json ,published_at ,use_yn ) VALUES ( #{eventSeq} ,COALESCE(NULLIF(#{languageCode}, ''), 'en') ,COALESCE(NULLIF(#{pageStatus}, ''), 'draft') ,#{pageTitle} ,#{pageSubtitle} ,#{heroTitle} ,#{heroSubtitle} ,#{heroFileSeq} ,COALESCE(NULLIF(#{themeCode}, ''), 'kcab') ,COALESCE(NULLIF(#{themeJson}, '')::jsonb, '{}'::jsonb) ,COALESCE(NULLIF(#{settingsJson}, '')::jsonb, '{}'::jsonb) ,CASE WHEN #{pageStatus} = 'published' THEN COALESCE(#{publishedAt}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ELSE #{publishedAt} END ,'Y' )
mapper.update: UPDATE event.event_page_blocks b SET deleted_at = COALESCE(b.deleted_at, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ,updated_by = #{userSeq} ,updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP FROM event.event_page_sections s WHERE s.section_seq = b.section_seq AND s.event_page_seq = #{eventPageSeq} AND b.deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(owner_user.email, ''), NULLIF(o.contact_email, '')) AS recipient_email ,COALESCE(NULLIF(owner_user.name, ''), o.name) AS recipient_name ,o.name AS organization_name FROM event.events e LEFT JOIN event.organizations o ON o.organization_seq = e.organization_seq LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT u.email ,u.name FROM event.organization_members om INNER JOIN event.users u ON u.user_seq = om.user_seq AND u.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE om.organization_seq = e.organization_seq ORDER BY CASE WHEN om.role = 'owner' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ,CASE WHEN u.status = 'active' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ,om.created_at ASC NULLS LAST LIMIT 1 ) owner_user ON TRUE WHERE e.event_seq = #{eventSeq} AND e.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT ep.event_pricing_seq ,ep.event_seq ,ep.price_type ,ep.price_name ,ep.currency_code ,ep.amount ,ep.sales_start_at ,ep.sales_end_at ,ep.use_yn ,ep.sort_seq ,COALESCE(payment_usage.sold_count, 0) AS sold_count ,COALESCE(payment_usage.payment_count, 0) AS payment_count FROM event.event_pricing ep LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE p.status = 'paid') AS sold_count ,COUNT(*) AS payment_count FROM event.payments p WHERE p.event_pricing_seq = ep.event_pricing_seq ) payment_usage ON TRUE WHERE ep.event_seq = #{eventSeq} AND ep.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY ep.sort_seq ASC, ep.event_pricing_seq ASC

SELECT dc.discount_code_seq ,dc.event_seq ,dc.discount_code ,dc.discount_type ,dc.discount_value ,dc.currency_code ,dc.applies_to_price_type ,dc.usage_limit ,COALESCE(payment_usage.used_count, 0) AS used_count ,COALESCE(payment_usage.payment_count, 0) AS payment_count ,dc.valid_from_at ,dc.valid_to_at ,dc.use_yn ,dc.sort_seq FROM event.event_discount_codes dc LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE p.status = 'paid') AS used_count ,COUNT(*) AS payment_count FROM event.payments p WHERE p.event_seq = dc.event_seq AND p.discount_code_seq = dc.discount_code_seq ) payment_usage ON TRUE WHERE dc.event_seq = #{eventSeq} AND dc.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY dc.sort_seq ASC, dc.discount_code_seq ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO event.events ( slug, title, description, event_type, is_paid, start_at, end_at, registration_start_at, registration_end_at, venue_name, max_participants, organization_seq, file_seq, attachment_file_seq, registration_type, registration_url, status, created_by, updated_by ) VALUES ( COALESCE(NULLIF(#{slug}, ''), 'event-' || substr(md5(random()::text || clock_timestamp()::text), 1, 12)), #{title}, COALESCE(#{description}, #{content}), COALESCE(NULLIF(#{eventType}, ''), 'main'), COALESCE(#{isPaid}, false), #{eventStartDt}, #{eventEndDt}, #{registrationStartDt}, #{registrationEndDt}, #{location}, #{maxParticipants}, #{organizationSeq}, #{fileSeq}, #{attachmentFileSeq}, COALESCE(NULLIF(#{registrationType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ''), 'direct'), #{registrationUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, COALESCE(NULLIF(#{status}, ''), 'draft'), #{rgstUserSeq}, #{uptUserSeq} )
mapper.update: UPDATE event.event_pricing ep SET deleted_at = COALESCE(deleted_at, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ,updated_by = #{userSeq} ,updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE ep.event_seq = #{eventSeq} AND ep.deleted_at IS NULL AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM event.payments p WHERE p.event_pricing_seq = ep.event_pricing_seq )

UPDATE event.event_pricing ep SET deleted_at = COALESCE(deleted_at, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ,updated_by = #{userSeq} ,updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE ep.event_pricing_seq = #{eventPricingSeq} AND ep.deleted_at IS NULL AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM event.payments p WHERE p.event_pricing_seq = ep.event_pricing_seq )

UPDATE event.event_discount_codes dc SET deleted_at = COALESCE(deleted_at, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ,updated_by = #{userSeq} ,updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE dc.event_seq = #{eventSeq} AND dc.deleted_at IS NULL AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM event.payments p WHERE p.event_seq = dc.event_seq AND p.discount_code_seq = dc.discount_code_seq )

UPDATE event.event_discount_codes dc SET deleted_at = COALESCE(deleted_at, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ,updated_by = #{userSeq} ,updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE dc.discount_code_seq = #{discountCodeSeq} AND dc.deleted_at IS NULL AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM event.payments p WHERE p.event_seq = dc.event_seq AND p.discount_code_seq = dc.discount_code_seq )
mapper.delete: UPDATE event.events SET deleted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ,updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE event_seq = #{eventSeq}
